description:
Add a new Emergency Medical Service (EMS) resource to the CAMEO Data Manager community resources database with the following details:

- Name: Metro Lifeline Ambulance Service
- Category: EMS/Ambulance/Rescue
- Address: 2710 Commerce Park Drive, Jefferson City, MO 65109
- Phone: (573) 635-7820
- 24-Hour Phone: (573) 635-7911
- Contact: Captain Diana Hartwell (Title: EMS Operations Director)
- Notes: Contracted provider for EPCRA industrial corridor. 2 ALS units, 1 BLS unit available 24/7. Hazmat medical support certified.
